title: Glowing Coals
description: A bed of embers breathing in the dark — crusted charcoal chunks packed together, molten-orange heat glowing up through the cracks between them, brightening and dimming as unseen draughts fan across the bed. Blow on it (move the pointer) to fan a patch hotter; beats gust the whole bed alive and lift the odd spark. Heat, airflow, crust, cracks and palette are live and mappable.
